positive: A geometric, stylized portrait of a majestic woodland creature, perhaps a fox or a stag, integrated with cosmic and floral elements. The composition features a central, powerful silhouette against a vibrant nebula background. Use high contrast line art combined with soft, glowing watercolor washes of deep blues, emerald greens, gold, and magenta. The overall style should be Neo-Art Nouveau meets Mystical Geometry, emphasizing symmetry and clean, printable areas. The aesthetic should be intricate but readable, suitable for a single-color print effect on a garment. Central composition, highly detailed linework, ethereal glow, deep depth of field.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, ugly, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, multiple figures, noisy, grayscale, amateur, abstract, graffiti
